mapper.update:
UPDATE inventory_lot
current_qty=#{currentQty}, last_modified_at=#{updateAt},
status='SOLD_OUT',
WHERE inventory_lot_id=#{inventoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_movement ( movement_id, inventory_lot_id, movement_type, qty, before_qty, after_qty, source_type, source_id, created_by, created_at ) SELECT #{movementId}, il.inventory_lot_id, #{movementType}, #{quantity}, il.current_qty, il.current_qty-#{quantity}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{employeeId}, SYSTIMESTAMP FROM inventory_lot il WHERE il.inventory_lot_id=#{inventoryLotId} AND il.current_qty>=#{quantity}
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_lot SET current_qty = current_qty-#{quantity}, last_modified_at=SYSTIMESTAMP, status= CASE WHEN current_qty - #{quantity} <=0 THEN 'SOLD_OUT' ELSE status END WHERE INVENTORY_LOT_ID=#{inventoryLotId} AND current_qty>=#{quantity} AND status='NORMAL'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO shipment ( shipment_id, so_id, shipped_emp_id, shipment_date, status,
memo,
created_at ) VALUES ( #{shipmentId}, #{soId}, #{shippedEmpId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{status},
#{memo},
#{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO shipment_detail ( shipment_detail_id, shipment_id, so_detail_id, inventory_lot_id, product_id, shipped_qty ) VALUES ( #{shipmentDetailId}, #{shipmentId}, #{salesOrderDetailId}, #{inventoryLotId}, #{productId}, #{shippedQty} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET status=#{status} WHERE sales_order.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND status='APPROVED'
UPDATE shipment SET status=#{status} WHERE shipment_id=#{shipmentId} AND status='SHIPPED'
mapper.select:
SELECT sh.shipment_id, sdh.shipment_detail_id, sh.so_id as salesOrderId, cu.customer_name, so.order_date, shipment_date, sh.shipped_emp_id, em.emp_name as employeeName, sh.status, product_name, sdh.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, sdh.shipped_qty, pr.product_id FROM shipment sh JOIN shipment_detail sdh ON sdh.shipment_id=sh.shipment_id JOIN sales_order so ON so.so_id=sh.so_id JOIN customer cu ON cu.customer_id=so.customer_id JOIN product pr ON pr.product_id=sdh.product_id JOIN employee em ON em.emp_id=sh.shipped_emp_id JOIN inventory_lot il ON il.inventory_lot_id=sdh.inventory_lot_id WHERE sh.shipment_id=#{shipmentId}
AND sh.status=UPPER(#{status})
SELECT so.so_id, so.status FROM sales_order so WHERE so.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND so.status='APPROVED'
SELECT so.so_id, so_detail_id, so.status, sod.product_id, sod.order_qty FROM sales_order so JOIN sales_order_detail sod ON sod.so_id=so.so_id WHERE so.so_id=#{salesOrderId} AND so.status='APPROVED'
SELECT shipment_id, shipment_date, status FROM shipment sh WHERE status!='CANCELED' AND sh.so_id=#{salesOrderId}
SELECT * FROM sales_order WHERE status='APPROVED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipment sh WHERE sh.so_id=so_id )

SELECT so.so_id, so.customer_id, so.request_emp_id, so.approve_emp_id, so.order_date, so.approve_date, so.status, so.created_at, so.updated_at, sod.so_detail_id, sod.order_qty, sod.product_id, pr.product_name, pr.safety_qty, pr.maker_name, NVL(SUM(il.current_qty),0) as available_qty FROM sales_order so join sales_order_detail sod on so.so_id=sod.so_id join product pr on pr.product_id=sod.product_id left join inventory_lot il on il.product_id=sod.product_id AND il.status='NORMAL' AND il.current_qty>0 AND il.expiry_date>=SYSDATE+11 WHERE so.so_id=#{soId} AND so.status='APPROVED' AND pr.status='ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipment sh WHERE sh.so_id=so.so_id ) GROUP BY ( so.so_id, so.customer_id, so.request_emp_id, so.approve_emp_id, so.order_date, so.approve_date, so.status, so.created_at, so.updated_at, sod.so_detail_id, sod.product_id, sod.order_qty, pr.product_name, pr.safety_qty, pr.maker_name)

SELECT il.inventory_lot_id, pr.product_id, pr.product_code, pr.product_name, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty AS qty, il.location, il.status, il.created_at FROM inventory_lot il JOIN Product pr ON pr.product_id=il.product_id WHERE pr.product_id=#{productId}

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 11 THEN il.current_qty ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS availableQty, NVL(p.safety_qty, 0) AS safetyQty, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 11 THEN il.current_qty ELSE 0 END ), 0) - NVL(p.safety_qty, 0) AS shippableQty FROM product p LEFT JOIN inventory_lot il ON il.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.safety_qty
